tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Been flyin' solo for so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Nobody's singin' the harmony[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Up there just me and my shadow[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
No bass, no guitar, no tambourine[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
  And I found you like a melody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
  You were singin' in the same key as me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
  We had ‘em dancin' in the streets[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna be a rolling stone, alone[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Puttin' miles on a run-down van[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, we can take our own show on the road[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I'll lay down the beat, you'll carry the tune[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
We'll get tattoos, and we'll trash hotel rooms[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]



[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I wanna run down your wild dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna chase every high with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Count every rip in these old jeans[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
We'll never learn how to sing the blues[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  If I'm gonna be famous[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
  Girl, I wanna be famous with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  We got our own little groove[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna be a rolling stone, alone[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Puttin' miles on a run-down van[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, we can take our own show on the road[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
I'll lay down the beat, you'll carry the tune[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
We'll get tattoos, and we'll trash hotel rooms[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
When the spotlight goes cold, and the curtains come down[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
The chairs are all stacked, and there's no one around[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
And nobody's payin', we’ll still be playin'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna be a rolling stone, alone[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Puttin' miles on a run-down van[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, we can take our own show on the road[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I'll lay down the beat, you'll carry the tune[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
We'll get tattoos, and we'll trash hotel rooms[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]
